current_suggestion.pitch: Your philosophy interest is covered through Marcus Aurelius and Stoicism, but Odyssey fills a gap by going deeper into primary texts across the full breadth of ancient and modern philosophy — Aristotle's ethics, Kant, Nietzsche, existentialism — with rigorous solo academic lectures rather than interview-format discussion. This gives you a grounding in the broader philosophical tradition that makes your Stoic reading sharper by contrast and context. The format is structured, solo explainer lectures with genuine depth, not motivational repackaging.
